title: Video to Text Transcriber
summary: Drop in a YouTube or video URL and get back a transcription through an n8n-powered multi-source pipeline.
businessOutcome: Turn source videos into searchable text faster so clips, summaries, SOPs, and content repurposing start from clean transcripts instead of manual note-taking.
thumbnail: Paste URL in. Queue transcription. Read the transcript below.
problem: Video content is hard to reuse when the transcript sits behind manual downloads, copy-paste workflows, or tool switching.
solution: This transcriber accepts video URLs, routes them through the right source pipeline, and returns transcription text back into the web app callback flow.
workflowOverview: Accepts a YouTube, social, or supported video URL
Routes the job through n8n with the selected transcription provider
Returns the finished transcript back into the app via callback
audience: Creators, agencies, operators, and teams repurposing long-form video content
